km.France: ប្រទេសបារាំង

zh.lifeSummary: Marie de Montfort於大約1180年與Sire Nicolas II de Barbençon在法國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1244年。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Marie de Montfort于大约1180年与Sire Nicolas II de Barbençon在法国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1244年。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

en.lifeSummary: Marie de Montfort married Sire Nicolas II de Barbençon about 1180, in France. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1244.

fr.lifeSummary: Marie de Montfort a épousé Sire Nicolas II de Barbençon environ 1180, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1244.

de.lifeSummary: Marie de Montfort hat um 1180 in Frankreich Sire Nicolas II de Barbençon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1244.

it.lifeSummary: Marie de Montfort lei sposato Sire Nicolas II de Barbençon circa 1180, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1244.

ja.lifeSummary: Marie de Montfortは約1180年にフランスでSire Nicolas II de Barbençonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1244年に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marie de Montfort(은)는 대략 1180년 프랑스에서 Sire Nicolas II de Barbençon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1244년 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Marie de Montfort casou-se com Sire Nicolas II de Barbençon aproximadamente 1180, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1244.

ru.lifeSummary: Marie de Montfort вышла замуж за человека по имени Sire Nicolas II de Barbençon около 1180 г. в местности Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1244 г.

es.lifeSummary: Marie de Montfort se casó con Sire Nicolas II de Barbençon aproximadamente 1180, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1244.

th.1200–Male: ปี1200–ถึงแก่กรรม
